Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Regents]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The four Regents have helped hold the Empire together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Four Regents helped restore order to the Capital after the Emperor's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Regents are attempting to manage the Empire in the absence of an Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Regents and the Blackwatch have handled the Elders for the past five years.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Yala is afraid of the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — The Regents wanted the Empire to remain in anarchy following the Emperor's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — The Regents are four Imperial heroes who were woken by Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Empire is divided into regions under four Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Regents split the world into four.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Regents are the four most powerful people in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Regents were provoked for a calculated reason.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Regents are a group that needs to be kept under control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Regents are a group that the people might look to for defense instead of the Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Regents are a group that might be unaware of movements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — Some Champions believe the Empire should be governed by separate regions under Regents.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — One of the Regents has been killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The Regents are described as formidable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Regents are not interested in unifying the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Regents are on the side of the Independents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — Regents are political figures targeted by the Magister's Guild assassins.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Regents have the ability to Read shady backgrounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Two of the three Regents sealed the peace accords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Regents attacked the Imperial Steward under a flag of truce.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The Regents are a group that holds power within the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Calder is not cooperating with the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — The Empire currently has only two active Regents and no Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Calder believes a piece of the Optasia would allow him to stand as an equal to the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — There are two remaining Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — The Regents are willing to try Calder's plan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Calder had to hide the Emperor's armor from the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — There was a battle between Kelarac and the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The four Regents are cast in bronze and stand guard over Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Regents are fighting bronze effigies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Regents were floating in the air.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Shera freed the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Regents are a group that Shera is demonstrating Consultant assets to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — The Regents must approve the organization of the meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Regents may wage war to the full extent of their powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — Regents are companions of the Emperor who sleep until needed to defend humanity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — The Regents are connected to the Mistress of the Mists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — The Regents are asleep in the coffins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Regents were not present at the meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — The Regents are part of the Aurelian Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — The Regents would depose the Guilds, specifically the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — The Emperor knows the Regents personally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — The Regents are sleeping.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — The frozen Regents are a group that Lucan and Shera must face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 17''' — The tomb being examined is the tomb of the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — The Regents were the only authority figure left.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Regents provided firsthand accounts regarding the Elder War.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Regents are expected to step down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — There are four Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — The Regents are among those who could potentially threaten Urg'naut or Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — The Regents made their own preparations while the mortals crammed allies on ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — The three Regents are fighting Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — The Regents seemed to have Kelarac under control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — The Regents are four ancient bronze statues of the four Regents of Beldin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — The Regents still flew in the skies after the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — The Regents are fighting against Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Bronze statues of the Regents drop from holes in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — The Regents have bronze statues that use weapons.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
